# EDHTop16 Fixture Notes

Date recorded: 2026-06-21

These fixtures are local GraphQL-shape samples built from EDHTop16 public schema field names. They cover tournament metadata, visible deck entries, hidden deck entries, standalone decklist responses, missing optional fields, missing required fields, GraphQL-style malformed payloads, and raw payload preservation.

They are not live API responses. Replace or supplement with captured responses when a stable EDHTop16 fixture capture is available.
